decision: All landing zones deploy to a single region — the platform, owns the region decision.
why: Without a single region, every deployment carries its own region decision — service parity depends on each engineer's choice rather than being a platform default.

links.note: The region is defined once in githubVariables.json — all deployments read it from there.
GitHub runner VNet integration is region-gated, so the platform's chosen region must support it.

violations: bicepparam with hardcoded location overrides workflow-injected region.
Platform region set to a region where GitHub runners VNet integration is unavailable.
